title: Concept graph (per-topic)
description: Shape of concepts/<topic>.json. Documents the concept graph for one topic page. The top-level `concepts` array is the source of truth for ids, anchors, prereq edges, and blurbs consumed by pathway.html, quiz.js, and the various audit scripts.

topic.description: Topic slug, typically matching the JSON filename stem (e.g. "category-theory").

title.description: Human-readable topic title, shown on pathway.html and section indexes.

page.description: Relative URL of the topic HTML page (e.g. "category-theory.html").

id.description: Globally unique concept id (kebab-case). Other topics' prereqs may reference it.

title.description: Short human-readable title shown on pathway.html and quiz widgets.

anchor.description: Matches an id="…" on a <section> in the topic HTML page. Deep-link target.

prereqs.description: Concept ids this concept depends on. May cross topic boundaries. Empty array for foundational concepts.

blurb.description: 1–2 sentence summary (KaTeX allowed) shown on the pathway detail panel.

tags.description: Optional free-form tags. Observed: "foundation" on complex-numbers.
